_comment: Za.allyErrands — Make.com Scenario 1: New Request + Payment Link
_instructions: Import this into Make.com (three-dot menu > Import blueprint).
This scenario fires when a new errand request hits the webhook.
It notifies admin that a request is pending payment.
The Edge Function handles Flutterwave and client WhatsApp directly.
Make.com here handles the ADMIN / PHALANX alert only.
name: Za.allyErrands — New Request Alert
